svg.title: apps/client Package DAG
svg.desc: Dependency closure for apps/client (@mdwrk/mdwrkspace) Arrows and the dependency list both use consumer depends on dependency direction.
svg.text: Read every arrow as: consumer depends on dependency.
Left side = consumer. Right side = packages it depends on.
depends on: extension-host, extension-manifest, extension-runtime, testing
Generated from package.json direct internal dependencies. Transitive relationships appear only through direct edges.
